79.title: Tennis Odds: Tennis Lines & Live Odds | FanDuel Sportsbook
79.description: Find the most up to date Tennis spreads and live betting odds for all upcoming matches and major tournaments on FanDuel Sportsbook. Sign up today!
79.footer:
Sportsbook Odds / Tennis Odds

Tennis Odds: Bet on Tennis at FanDuel Sportsbook

FanDuel Sportsbook offers the most up-to-date tennis odds to provide tennis fans the best opportunity to bet on upcoming matches. At our online sportsbook, we offer tennis betting on major tennis matches around the world. We offer tennis betting lines for major international tournaments, championships and single matches. Explore Australian Open betting odds alongside today’s tennis lines at FanDuel Sportsbook. On FanDuel you can even bet a tennis parlay with the potential to win big.

Popular Types of Tennis Betting Odds


  • Tennis Moneyline Bet: Betting on which player will win the tennis match or tournament.
  • Tennis Set Betting: Betting on the results of the tennis match in sets.
  • To Win First Set: Wager on who will win the first set.
  • Tennis Prop Bets: Wager on a specific aspect of an event or player.
  • Match Spread Bet: Bet on the match spread which refers to the amount of points an opponent will win or lose by.
  • Tie Break in Match: Bet on whether or not there will be a tie break in the tennis match.
  • Tennis Parlay Bets: Combine two or more tennis bets to increase your payout. The tennis odds will adjust as all bets will need to win.

Live Tennis Odds

Looking to place live tennis bets? With FanDuel you can place most types of tennis bets right up until the end of the match, referred to as live or in-game wagers. The tennis odds for live wagers continually update as the tennis match progresses.

How to Bet on Tennis Odds

FanDuel Sportsbook makes it very simple to bet on tennis legally in the United States. Just take a look at our tennis betting tables above to see the most recent tennis odds and spreads for upcoming and live tennis matches, select your bets and submit your betslip.

Understanding Tennis Betting Odds

As with any online sports betting odds, you will see either a plus sign (+) or a minus sign (-) next to the tennis lines to indicate the likelihood of that player winning. When you read tennis odds, any odds with a plus sign means you will earn that much money for every $100 you wager. Any tennis odds with the minus sign means you need to bet that much money in order to win $100.

As an example, if you wanted to bet on the Australian Open and placed a $150 outright bet on Novak Djokovic to win at -150 odds, that bet would pay $250 (your original $150 stake and $100 in winnings). If you wagered $100 on Rafael Nadal to win at +200 odds, you would earn $300 (your original $100 bet and $200 in winnings).

More Information on Tennis Betting

All tennis bets (including any specials or statistics-based bets) will be settled in accordance with the official website of each tournament's governing body. Please note that some tennis matches will have differing match formats (i.e. 4 Game Sets, Championship Tie Break etc).

In the event of a change in the number of sets (or games per set) to be played, bets for match betting markets and “To Win First Set” markets will stand.

In the event of a tennis event not taking place or if a player is given a walkover, bets on the event are deemed void.

Champions Tie Breaks: In some competitions, matches that reach one set all are decided by a Champions tie-break. If a match is decided by a Champions tie-break then the Champions tie-break will be considered to be the third set.

Due to possible delays or inaccuracies, the FanDuel Sportsbook Live Tennis scoreboard may not be reflective of actual Live scores and therefore should not be solely relied upon in determining whether to place a live tennis bet or not.

More rules regarding tennis betting can be found in the FanDuel Sportsbook House Rules

83.title: Tennis Tournament Betting and Futures Odds | FanDuel Sportsbook
83.description: Explore tennis tournament betting odds across ATP, WTA, Challenger, ITF, and seasonal events throughout the global tennis calendar on FanDuel Sportsbook.
83.footer:
Sportsbook Odds / Tennis Odds / Tennis Tournaments

Tennis Tournament Odds and Events

Tennis tournament odds refresh regularly as matches progress, draws update, and player performance shifts. Check back throughout the year for the latest tennis betting odds across ATP, WTA, Challenger, ITF, UTR, Pro Series, and all major annual tournaments available on FanDuel Sportsbook.

Types of Tennis Tournaments Available:


ATP and WTA Tour Events

Weekly men’s and women’s tournaments held around the world, offering match winner odds, totals, spreads, props, live betting, and futures markets.

Challenger Tour Tournaments

Second-tier professional events featuring rising talent and experienced players, creating strong opportunities for bettors who follow form, momentum, and up-and-coming competitors.

ITF Tennis Competitions

A wide range of international tournaments with high match volume and consistent betting opportunities throughout the season.

Grand Slam Odds

This section includes listings for men’s and women’s tournaments from the sport’s four major events. Each major event has its own dedicated odds page where you can explore full markets and updated lines.

  • Australian Open

  • French Open (Roland Garros)

  • Wimbledon

  • US Open

639.title: Tennis ITF & Challenger Betting Live Odds | FanDuel Sportsbook
639.description: Find the latest tennis ITF and Challenger betting odds on FanDuel Sportsbook. View match lines, live markets, and daily odds from international tennis events.
639.footer:
Sportsbook Odds / Tennis Odds / ITF and Challenger Odds

ITF and Challenger Tennis Betting

ITF and Challenger events run throughout the year and feature a wide mix of rising players, established pros, and competitors working toward higher-level ATP and WTA events. These tournaments offer consistent match volume and frequent updates, giving bettors a steady stream of odds each day.

Types of ITF and Challenger Odds Available


Match Odds

Each match includes basic markets like moneyline, spreads, and totals. These odds update regularly as matches approach and once play begins.

Live Betting Options

Live betting is available on many ITF and Challenger matches, with odds adjusting point-by-point as momentum shifts on court.

Tournament Variety

These circuits include events across different countries, surfaces, and formats, creating a wide range of matchups and betting opportunities throughout the season.

How ITF and Challenger Tournaments Fit Into Tennis

ITF and Challenger competitions serve as key pathways for players aiming to break into higher-tier ATP and WTA events. Strong results in these tournaments often help players build ranking points and move closer to qualifying for major events and Grand Slam tournaments.
